title: dactylorhiza integrata
intro: Dactylorhiza integrata is a species of orchid, commonly known as the marsh helleborine, which is a perennial plant found in wet meadows and marshy areas. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Dactylorhiza integrata include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Dactylorhiza integrata can be prepared as a decoction, tincture, or tea, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
